briefdescription.para: This function resets the IIC instance for IDT_8T49N24x.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to IDT_8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to IDT_8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function reads a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value, u8 Mask)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the IDT 8T49N24x device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Input)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_InputMonitorControl

briefdescription.para: This function set the input monitor control.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Input)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_PreDivider

briefdescription.para: This function set the pre-divider.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Input)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_M1Feedback

briefdescription.para: This function set the M1 feedback.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the DSM integer.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the DSM fractional.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Output)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_OutputDividerInteger

briefdescription.para: This function set the Output divider integer.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Output)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_OutputDividerFractional

briefdescription.para: This function set the Output divider fractional.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the mode (jitter attenuator / synthesizer)

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the settings.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the DPLL and APLL calibration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Input, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_ReferenceInput

briefdescription.para: This function sets disables / enables the reference inputs.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock

briefdescription.para: This function calculates and sets the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the given clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

specifies if the operation mode is locked/synthesizer mode.
TRUE Synthesizer mode (Fout only)
FALSE Locked mode (Fout locked to Fin)

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the IDT 8TN49N24x device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 IICAddress, u32 InFreq, u32 OutFreq)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_I2cClk

briefdescription.para: This function setup IDT 8T49N24x clock generator either in free or locked mode.
This function setup IDT 8T49N24x clock generator to enable GPIO[3] to be used as LoL indicator.
